content:
💡 neko | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a secure, self-hosted, and accessible virtual browser environment for private browsing, collaboration, and shared media experiences.
✨ Key Features: • Self-hosted virtual browser • Docker containerization • WebRTC for streaming • Secure and private browsing • Multi-user access
📖 Summary: Neko is a self-hosted virtual browser running in Docker, utilizing WebRTC for secure and private internet access from anywhere. It allows multiple users to access a shared browser environment simultaneously, making it suitable for collaboration, remote work, and shared viewing experiences like watch parties and interactive presentations.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
